chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.101 of 2019 Asghar Ali Agha and others Versus Province of Sindh and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.421/2019 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 11.03.2024 Mr. Shoaib Ali Khatian, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant submits that he would be satisfied if the suit, in which the impugned interim order was passed, could be ordered to be disposed off on merit after recording evidence without being influenced by any observation made in the impugned interim order. Accordingly, the appeal is disposed off along with pending application(s) with the understanding that after recording of evidence, as desired by the parties, the suit be taken to its logical end without being influenced by the interim order impugned in this appeal. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
